properties.uganda info box text: Aid Pioneers, in partnership with Mandulis Energy, is launching an innovative project in Northern Uganda to install four solar systems at healthcare facilities, transforming them into charging hubs for electric vehicles (EVs). This approach addresses three core challengesâabsence of grid infrastructure, unaffordable solar access, and low local energy demandâby combining clean energy with affordable EV leasing that creates jobs and delivers electricity to families. The initiative is projected to save lives, support over 480 families, reduce 2,500 tons of COâ over ten years, and enable 350 urgent treatments daily. With strong repayment potential, the project presents a financially sound and high-impact investment opportunity. We are currently actively fundraising to initiate implementation and invite aligned partners to join us in scaling this transformative model.
